description: Style Note A great tie up shoe from vans, so comfortable, practical and durable you'll want to wear it every day. Built by skateboarders, for skateboarders, but loved by all for the perfect blend of classic cool and modern slick style. If you don't yet own a pair then this is a good place to start, and if you're already a Vans fan there's always room for one more great shoe in your closet. With a conservative upper, this slip on will coordinate with all your outfits, while the lining gives this shoe a little stylish lift. Comes with a spare set of laces. Product Details Round blunt black and purple checked shoe with lace up styling, comes with two laces for better styling (1 set of purple and 1 set of black lace) Inner fabric lining with a padded footbed and a padded mouth Overlay at the heel collar Brand name on the back, on the lasting Cushioned footbed for all day comfort PU midsole for better shock absorption Rubber outsole with reverse waffle patterned grooves for better grip  Material and Care Fabric, synthetic Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
